Pricing.title: Start free. Pay only when your agent reads a skill.
Pricing.description: No subscription and no expiring credits. Search, organize collections, and inspect usage for free; one successful protected skill-content call costs one credit.
Pricing.slotDescription: Every account starts with 5 slots. Each additional slot costs 5,000 VND, and several can be purchased at once.

free.name: Free
free.description: For evaluating OceanSkill and connecting your first agent.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For personal workflows and occasional agent use.

builder.name: Builder
builder.description: For builders who use multiple skills every week.
features: Usage history and requestId replay safety

power.name: Power
power.description: For intensive agent workflows and larger projects.

Pricing.usageDescription: The billing model follows actual protected-content delivery, not browsing or setup.

charged.title: 1 credit
charged.description: A successful new get_skill_md or get_skill_reference call for the current version.

free.title: 0 credits
free.description: Search, metadata, list skills, collections, toggle skill, and usage summary.

retry.title: 0 extra
retry.description: An exact replay within 10 minutes using the same requestId, skill, tool, resource, and current version.

failed.title: Released
failed.description: A failed content or reference read releases its reservation without finalizing a debit.

subscription.a: No. Paid options are one-time credit packs. Buy another pack only when you need it.

slots.q: What if I want to publish more than 5 private skills?
slots.a: Each 5,000 VND payment adds one private-skill slot. Pay a larger multiple of 5,000 VND to add several slots at once.

request.a: A valid replay with the same requestId for the same skill, version, and tool returns with zero extra credits.

refund.q: What happens when a call fails?
refund.a: The reserved credit is released when protected content is not delivered successfully.

Pricing.ctaTitle: Connect first, top up when you are ready.
Pricing.ctaDescription: Create a free account with 50 trial credits, then choose a pack that matches your workflow.
